working_on.task: Cut the 1.14.0 release, update continuity artifacts, and sync runtime registrations for Codex and Gemini

recent_changes: Forge 1.14.0 now ships fast-lane packet mode, packet graph contract, runtime health diagnostics, and host capability tier v2 as one coherent release line.
Release-facing docs and continuity artifacts now mark 1.14.0 as the current stable Forge release.
Runtime tool registrations were refreshed for both Codex and Gemini host state roots.
decisions_made: Treat 1.14.0 as stable only when the full roadmap-complete verification sweep and canonical repo gate are both green.
Fast-lane throughput gains remain valid only when packet graph/readiness and runtime-health contracts remain explicit in persisted workflow-state.
